summary: Evidence packet for the runx docs-doctor skill (umbtest03/docs-doctor@sha-169c63676569). A real post-publish dogfood run of the published package produced a sealed runx.receipt.v1 that passes runx verify with a production signature. The stale-docs case sealed with 1 doc finding(s) plus coverage_map, patch_plan, and a gated docs_pr_proposal; the fresh-docs case is the refused no-op path. All source and evidence artifacts pin to a single commit.

docs_corpus.content:
# CLI Reference

Run the system with `my-app run`.

user_task_matrix.expected_docs: Users need to know how to deploy.

input.style_policy: All new commands must be documented in cli-reference.md.

dogfood.command: runx skill umbtest03/docs-doctor@sha-169c63676569 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json docs_corpus='[{"page":"cli-reference.md","content":"# CLI Reference\n\nRun the system with `my-app run`."}]' --input-json product_surface='{"commands":[{"name":"my-app run","description":"Start the app"},{"name":"my-app deploy","description":"Deploy to cloud (NEW IN v2)"}],"endpoints":[],"schemas":[]}' --input-json user_task_matrix='[{"task":"Deploying the app","expected_docs":"Users need to know how to deploy."}]' -i style_policy='All new commands must be documented in cli-reference.md.' -R ./receipts

patch_plan: Update cli-reference.md to include my-app deploy

docs_pr_proposal.description: This PR adds the missing documentation for the new `my-app deploy` command.
docs_pr_proposal.title: docs: add missing deploy command documentation

observations.detail: Live registry listing / canonical adoption page.
Public PR against runxhq/runx containing the package.
Raw X.yaml at the source revision.
Raw SKILL.md at the source revision.

observations.value: runx login --provider github --for publish, then runx registry publish ./skills/docs-doctor/SKILL.md --registry https://api.runx.ai

Published package installs cleanly from the remote registry (runx add: source=remote, status=installed); harness cases validate: WSL local `runx harness ./skills/docs-doctor` passed 2/2 with 0 assertion errors (stale-docs sealed, fresh-docs refused). Environment: WSL Linux local + remote registry install.
observations.detail: Harness status with explicit environment labeling.

observations.value: runx skill umbtest03/docs-doctor@sha-169c63676569 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json docs_corpus='[{"page":"cli-reference.md","content":"# CLI Reference\n\nRun the system with `my-app run`."}]' --input-json product_surface='{"commands":[{"name":"my-app run","description":"Start the app"},{"name":"my-app deploy","description":"Deploy to cloud (NEW IN v2)"}],"endpoints":[],"schemas":[]}' --input-json user_task_matrix='[{"task":"Deploying the app","expected_docs":"Users need to know how to deploy."}]' -i style_policy='All new commands must be documented in cli-reference.md.' -R ./receipts

observations.detail: Sealed receipt id from the post-publish dogfood run (not a harness fixture seal).
runx verify verdict for the dogfood receipt.
Number of doc findings emitted in the stale-docs case.
Product-surface items missing from docs (coverage_map != documented).

observations.value: fresh-docs case: docs already match the product surface -> refused, no SBOM/no findings emitted
docs_pr_proposal present and gated: title='docs: add missing deploy command documentation', branch='docs/add-deploy-cmd' (consumed by issue-to-pr; this skill edits nothing)

Install: runx add umbtest03/docs-doctor@sha-169c63676569 --registry https://api.runx.ai. Run: runx skill umbtest03/docs-doctor@sha-169c63676569 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json docs_corpus='...' --input-json product_surface='...' --input-json user_task_matrix='...' -i style_policy='...' -R ./receipts. Verify: runx verify --receipt <receipt.json> --json (expects valid=true, signature_mode=production).
observations.detail: End-to-end install/run/verify for a new user without private context.
